meta.title: Optim – Insurance & Expenses | Manage your policies easily
meta.description: Optim helps you manage all your insurance policies and recurring expenses in one place. Get renewal alerts and optimize your coverage.
meta.ogDescription: The mobile app that centralizes your insurance policies, recurring expenses and alerts you before renewals. Available for Android.

hero.title: Take control of all your insurance
hero.subtitle: Optim centralizes your insurance policies, subscriptions and recurring expenses. Never miss a renewal and optimize what you pay.
hero.trustedBy: Thousands of users already optimizing their expenses

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Tools designed to simplify the management of your insurance and expenses every day.

items.title: Insurance Management
items.description: Centralize all your policies in a single dashboard. Home, car, life, health and more, always at a glance.

items.title: Renewal Alerts
items.description: Receive smart notifications before your policies expire. Never be caught off guard by a renewal again.

items.title: Expense Analytics
items.description: Visualize how much you spend on insurance and subscriptions each month. Identify savings opportunities at a glance.

items.title: Multiple Providers
items.description: Compatible with any insurer or provider. Add your policies regardless of who issued them.

items.title: Secure & Private
items.description: Your data is protected with end-to-end encryption. Your information is yours and no one else's.

items.title: Recurring Expenses
items.description: Record services, subscriptions and any periodic expense. Always have total control of your finances.

howItWorks.title: Get started in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No complications. In three steps you will have total control of your insurance and expenses.

steps.title: Download the app
steps.description: Available for free on Google Play. Install Optim in seconds and create your account.

steps.title: Add your policies
steps.description: Enter your insurance policies and recurring expenses. You only need the basic details for each policy.

steps.title: Get alerts and save
steps.description: Optim notifies you before each renewal and shows you where you can optimize your spending.

screenshots.title: Designed to be simple
screenshots.subtitle: A clean, intuitive interface that gives you control without overwhelming you with unnecessary information.

items.caption: Your summary at a glance. See how many contracts are active and which ones expire soon.
All your contracts at a glance. Sorted by renewal date so nothing slips through.
Know your real spend. Monthly and estimated annual, so you can make informed decisions.
Renew or modify with a tap. No paperwork, no hassle, done in seconds.

serviceCategories.title: For all your recurring expenses
serviceCategories.subtitle: Not just insurance. Optim centralizes everything you pay periodically in one single place.

cta.title: Start optimizing today
cta.subtitle: Take control of all your insurance and utilities. Free, no subscription, no ads.

footer.tagline: Manage your insurance and expenses with intelligence.
footer.cookieNotice: This site uses Plausible Analytics · no cookies · no personal data collected

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
sections.body:
The controller responsible for processing your personal data is:

  • Name: José Miguel Vilata Martínez
  • ID (NIF): 52649100F
  • Contact: privacidad@getoptim.app

sections.heading: 2. Data we collect
sections.body:
On the website (getoptim.app):

  • Email address and name (optional) when signing up for the waiting list or filling in the contact form.
  • Anonymised browsing data via Plausible Analytics (no cookies, no personal identifiers).

In the Optim mobile app:

  • Account data: email address and password (encrypted).
  • Policy and contract data: insurer or provider, contract type, expiry dates, amount, and any other information entered voluntarily.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose of processing
sections.body:
a) Service delivery: registration and authentication, policy and contract management, renewal and expiry alerts, and user support.

b) Marketing communications (only with explicit consent): sending news, product updates, and service-related communications.

sections.heading: 4. Legal basis
sections.body:
• Service delivery: performance of the contract accepted upon registration (Art. 6.1.b GDPR).
  • Marketing communications: explicit consent of the data subject (Art. 6.1.a GDPR), revocable at any time without affecting the provision of the service.

sections.heading: 5. Data retention
sections.body: Data will be retained for as long as the account remains active. After a deletion request, data will be erased within a maximum of 30 days, unless a longer retention period is required by law. Consent records will be retained for 3 years in accordance with applicable regulations.

sections.heading: 6. Recipients and international transfers
sections.body:
No data is shared with third parties for commercial purposes. The following processors are used to deliver the service:

  • Supabase Inc. — cloud storage and authentication, with adequate transfer safeguards in accordance with the GDPR.

All processors have signed the corresponding data processing agreements in accordance with Article 28 of the GDPR.

sections.heading: 7. Your rights
sections.body:
You have the right to exercise the following rights over your personal data:

  • Access: obtain confirmation of whether your data is being processed and receive a copy.
  • Rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
  • Erasure: request the deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten").
  • Restriction: request restriction of processing in certain circumstances.
  • Portability: receive your data in a structured, commonly used format.
  • Objection: object to processing for marketing communications at any time.

To exercise these rights, send an email to privacidad@getoptim.app stating the right you wish to exercise and attaching a copy of your identity document. We will respond within a maximum of one month.

sections.heading: 8. Cookies and tracking
sections.body:
This website uses Plausible Analytics, a privacy-friendly analytics solution that does not use cookies and does not collect personally identifiable data. No cookie consent is required for its use.

If in the future we incorporate technologies that use non-essential cookies, we will request your prior consent in accordance with applicable regulations.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to this policy
sections.body: The data controller reserves the right to modify this policy, notifying the user at least 30 days in advance by email. Continued use of the service after the changes take effect constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: 10. Supervisory authority
sections.body: If you believe that the processing of your data violates applicable regulations, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.

sections.heading: 1. Service description
sections.body: Optim is a mobile application and web service for personal management of insurance policies and recurring expenses (utilities, subscriptions). It allows you to centralise contracts, receive expiry alerts, and visualise personal spending. The service is provided free of charge, with no advertising and no commercial intermediation with insurers or providers.

sections.heading: 2. Service provider
sections.body:
The service is provided by:

  • Name: José Miguel Vilata Martínez
  • ID (NIF): 52649100F
  • Contact: hola@getoptim.app

sections.heading: 3. Account registration
sections.body: Use of the application requires creating an account with a valid email address and expressly accepting these Terms and the Privacy Policy. The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials and all activities carried out under their account.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable use
sections.body: The user agrees to use the service lawfully and not to enter false or malicious data or data that infringes third-party rights. The service is intended exclusively for personal management of the user's own contracts and insurance policies.

sections.heading: 5. Data responsibility
sections.body: Optim acts as a personal organisation tool. The user is solely responsible for the accuracy of the data entered. Optim does not verify or validate registered contracts and has no relationship with the user's insurers or providers.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of liability
sections.body: The service provider shall not be liable for financial losses arising from undetected expiries, errors in data entered by the user, or service interruptions. The service is provided "as is" and may be subject to interruptions for maintenance or reasons beyond the provider's control.

sections.heading: 7. Changes to these terms
sections.body: The service provider reserves the right to modify these Terms, notifying the user at least 30 days in advance by email. The user retains the non-waivable right to cancel their account before the changes take effect. Continued use of the service after that date constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.heading: 8. Account deletion and data portability
sections.body: The user may request account deletion at any time from within the application or by writing to privacidad@getoptim.app. Before permanent deletion, the user may request an export of their data in CSV or JSON format. Data will be deleted within a maximum of 30 days from the deletion request.

sections.heading: 9. Governing law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute, the parties submit to the courts of the user's place of residence, in accordance with consumer and user protection regulations.
